rationale: No conflict. Tex. Const. art. VIII, §7-c governs dedication of state sales and use tax revenue to the highway fund. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisals—an entirely separate tax domain. The two provisions do not intersect.
quote: Sec. 7-c. DEDICATION OF REVENUE FROM STATE SALES AND USE TAX AND TAXES IMPOSED ON SALE, USE, OR RENTAL OF MOTOR VEHICLE TO STATE HIGHWAY FUND.
_note: Rule text addresses sales/use tax and motor vehicle tax revenue dedication; proposed change addresses property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
